cohort_definition_id.cohort_definition_id: An identifier linking to the cohort definition, representing the specific cohort to which the subject belongs.

subject_id.subject_id: A unique identifier for each subject (individual or entity) in the cohort, serving as the primary key for tracking individual subjects.

cohort_start_date.cohort_start_date: The date when the subject's membership in the cohort began, indicating the start of their participation.

cohort_end_date.cohort_end_date: The date when the subject's membership in the cohort ended, indicating the end of their participation.

care_site_id.care_site_id: A unique identifier for each care site, serving as the primary key for tracking individual care sites.

care_site_name.care_site_name: The name of the care site, providing a human-readable label for the care site.

place_of_service_concept_id.place_of_service_concept_id: A foreign key linking to the concept table, indicating the type of service provided at the care site.

location_id.location_id: A foreign key linking to the location table, indicating the physical location of the care site.

care_site_source_value.care_site_source_value: The original source value for the care site, providing traceability to the data source.

place_of_service_source_value.place_of_service_source_value: The original source value for the place of service, providing traceability to the data source.

start.start: The date and time when the allergy record began, indicating the start of the allergy documentation.

stop.stop: The date and time when the allergy record ended or was updated, indicating the end or modification of the allergy documentation.

patient.patient: An identifier linking to the patient entity, representing the individual with the allergy.

encounter.encounter: An identifier linking to the encounter entity, representing the specific healthcare interaction where the allergy was recorded.

code.code: A standardized code representing the allergy, used for consistent identification and classification.

description.description: A textual description of the allergy, providing additional details about the specific allergen or reaction.

start.start: The date and time when the condition started for the patient, indicating the onset of the medical issue.

stop.stop: The date and time when the condition ended for the patient, indicating the resolution or cessation of the medical issue.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient, serving as the primary key for tracking individual patients and their medical conditions.

encounter.encounter: An identifier linking to the specific medical encounter where the condition was documented, representing the context in which the condition was observed.

code.code: A standardized code for the condition, providing a categorical classification of the medical issue.

description.description: A textual description of the condition, providing detailed information about the medical issue.

date.date: The date when the immunization was administered, indicating the timing of the event.

patient.patient: A unique identifier for the patient who received the immunization, serving as the primary key for tracking individual patients.

encounter.encounter: An identifier linking to the specific medical encounter during which the immunization was administered, representing the context of the immunization event.

code.code: A code that identifies the specific type of immunization administered, categorizing the type of vaccine or treatment.

description.description: A detailed description of the immunization, providing additional information about the vaccine or treatment.

cost.cost: The cost associated with the immunization, representing the monetary value of the service provided.

cohort_definition_id.cohort_definition_id: A unique identifier for each cohort definition, serving as the primary key for tracking individual cohort definitions.

cohort_definition_name.cohort_definition_name: The name of the cohort definition, providing a label for easy reference.

cohort_definition_description.cohort_definition_description: A detailed description of the cohort definition, explaining its purpose and criteria.

definition_type_concept_id.definition_type_concept_id: An identifier linking to the type of definition used for the cohort, representing the classification of the cohort definition.

cohort_definition_syntax.cohort_definition_syntax: The syntax or rules used to define the cohort, specifying the conditions and logic for cohort membership.

subject_concept_id.subject_concept_id: An identifier linking to the subject concept for the cohort, representing the entity or group being studied.

cohort_initiation_date.cohort_initiation_date: The date when the cohort was initiated, indicating the start of the cohort's validity period.

domain_concept_id_1.domain_concept_id_1: A foreign key linking to the domain concept of the first fact, indicating the type of entity the first fact belongs to.

fact_id_1.fact_id_1: An identifier for the first fact, representing one of the entities involved in the relationship.

domain_concept_id_2.domain_concept_id_2: A foreign key linking to the domain concept of the second fact, indicating the type of entity the second fact belongs to.

fact_id_2.fact_id_2: An identifier for the second fact, representing the other entity involved in the relationship.

relationship_concept_id.relationship_concept_id: A unique identifier for the relationship type between the two facts, serving as the primary key for this table.

location_id.location_id: A unique identifier for each location, serving as the primary key for tracking individual locations.

address_1.address_1: The primary address line for the location, providing the street address.

address_2.address_2: The secondary address line for the location, often used for apartment or suite numbers.

city.city: The city where the location is situated, specifying the urban or municipal area.

state.state: The state where the location is situated, specifying the broader administrative region.

zip.zip: The postal code for the location, used for mail and geographic identification.

county.county: The county where the location is situated, specifying the local administrative area.

location_source_value.location_source_value: A source value or identifier for the location, often used to link to external systems or data sources.

person_id.person_id: A unique identifier for each individual person, serving as the primary key for tracking death records.

death_date.death_date: The date when the person died, indicating the timing of the death event.

death_datetime.death_datetime: The exact date and time when the person died, providing a more precise temporal context for the death event.

death_type_concept_id.death_type_concept_id: A standardized identifier that classifies the type of death (e.g., natural, accidental), providing context on how the person died.

cause_concept_id.cause_concept_id: A standardized identifier that identifies the cause of death, linking to a standardized concept for the cause.

cause_source_value.cause_source_value: The original source value for the cause of death, often from a medical record or death certificate, providing additional context.

cause_source_concept_id.cause_source_concept_id: A standardized identifier that links to a standardized concept for the source of the cause of death information, ensuring consistency in data interpretation.

id.id: A unique identifier for each care plan, serving as the primary key for tracking individual care plans.

start.start: The start date of the care plan, indicating when the care plan begins.

stop.stop: The end date of the care plan, indicating when the care plan ends.

patient.patient: An identifier linking to the patient for whom the care plan is created, representing the patient responsible for this care plan.

encounter.encounter: An identifier linking to the encounter during which the care plan was initiated, representing the context in which the care plan was created.

code.code: A standardized code for the type of care plan, providing a categorical classification of the care plan.

description.description: A detailed description of the care plan, providing additional context and details about the care plan.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A standardized code for the reason the care plan was created, providing a categorical classification of the reason for the care plan.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A detailed description of the reason the care plan was created, providing additional context and details about the reason for the care plan.

id.id: A unique identifier for each imaging study, serving as the primary key for tracking individual imaging sessions.

date.date: The date when the imaging study was performed, indicating the timing of the imaging session.

patient.patient: An identifier linking to the patient who underwent the imaging study, representing the patient involved in this session.

encounter.encounter: An identifier linking to the medical encounter during which the imaging study was performed, representing the context of the imaging session.

body site code.body site code: A code that classifies the body site where the imaging study was conducted, providing a standardized reference for the anatomical location.

body site description.body site description: A human-readable description of the body site code, providing a clear and understandable reference for the anatomical location.

modality code.modality code: A code that classifies the imaging modality used in the study, providing a standardized reference for the imaging technique.

modality description.modality description: A human-readable description of the modality code, providing a clear and understandable reference for the imaging technique.

sop code.sop code: A code that classifies the specific standard operating procedure (SOP) used in the imaging study, providing a standardized reference for the procedure.

sop description.sop description: A human-readable description of the SOP code, providing a clear and understandable reference for the procedure.

id.id: A unique identifier for each encounter, serving as the primary key for tracking individual encounters.

start.start: The start time of the encounter, indicating when the encounter began.

stop.stop: The end time of the encounter, indicating when the encounter ended.

patient.patient: An identifier linking to the patient involved in the encounter, representing the patient who received care.

provider.provider: An identifier linking to the healthcare provider involved in the encounter, representing the provider who delivered care.

encounterclass.encounterclass: A categorical attribute classifying the type of encounter (e.g., inpatient, outpatient), providing a high-level classification.

code.code: A code that uniquely identifies the type of encounter, providing a standardized reference for the encounter type.

description.description: A textual description of the encounter, providing more detailed information about the type of encounter.

cost.cost: The cost associated with the encounter, indicating the financial impact of the encounter.

reasoncode.reasoncode: A code that uniquely identifies the reason for the encounter, providing a standardized reference for the reason.

reasondescription.reasondescription: A textual description of the reason for the encounter, providing more detailed information about the reason.

observation_period_id.observation_period_id: A unique identifier for each observation period, serving as the primary key for tracking individual observation periods.

person_id.person_id: An identifier linking to the person associated with this observation period, representing the individual being observed.

observation_period_start_date.observation_period_start_date: The start date of the observation period, indicating when the observation period begins.

observation_period_end_date.observation_period_end_date: The end date of the observation period, indicating when the observation period ends.

period_type_concept_id.period_type_concept_id: A categorical identifier that classifies the type of observation period, providing context for the nature of the observation.

cdm_source_name.cdm_source_name: The full name of the data source or dataset, serving as the primary identifier for the data source in the Common Data Model (CDM).

cdm_source_abbreviation.cdm_source_abbreviation: A shorter, commonly used name or abbreviation for the data source, providing a quick reference to the cdm_source_name.

cdm_holder.cdm_holder: The organization or entity that holds or manages the data source, indicating the custodian of the data.

source_description.source_description: A detailed description of the data source, providing context and information about the data and its contents.

source_documentation_reference.source_documentation_reference: A reference to the documentation or additional resources about the data source, helping users understand and use the data.

cdm_etl_reference.cdm_etl_reference: A reference to the ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) process documentation or scripts used to transform the data into the CDM format, aiding in data transformation and integration.

source_release_date.source_release_date: The date when the data source was released or last updated, indicating the version of the data.

cdm_release_date.cdm_release_date: The date when the CDM version was released, indicating the version of the CDM used for the data source.

cdm_version.cdm_version: The version of the CDM used for the data source, specifying the CDM schema and structure.

vocabulary_version.vocabulary_version: The version of the vocabulary used in the CDM, specifying the standardized terminology and codes used in the data.

id.id: A unique identifier for each organization, serving as the primary key for tracking individual entities.

name.name: The name of the organization, providing a textual identifier for the entity.

address.address: The physical address of the organization, specifying the location where it operates.

city.city: The city where the organization is located, providing geographical context.

state.state: The state where the organization is located, providing additional geographical context.

zip.zip: The ZIP code of the organization's location, used for postal and geographical referencing.

phone.phone: The contact phone number of the organization, used for communication purposes.

utilization.utilization: A measure of the organization's usage or activity level, indicating how actively it is being utilized.

patient.patient: An identifier linking to the patient for whom the observation was made, representing the individual being observed.

description.description: A human-readable description of the observation, providing context and details about the measurement or result.

value.value: The result or measurement of the observation, indicating the specific value recorded during the encounter.

units.units: The units in which the observation value is measured, providing context for interpreting the result.

type.type: A classification of the type of observation, specifying the category (e.g., lab result, vital sign) of the data.

disease_status_source_value.disease_status_source_value: The source value for the disease status, providing additional context about the specimen's condition.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: A unique identifier for each visit occurrence, serving as the primary key for tracking individual visits.

person_id.person_id: An identifier linking to the person who had the visit, representing the individual involved in this visit.

visit_concept_id.visit_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the type of visit, providing a standardized code for the visit type.

visit_start_date.visit_start_date: The start date of the visit, indicating when the visit began.

visit_start_datetime.visit_start_datetime: The start datetime of the visit, providing a more precise timestamp for when the visit began.

visit_end_date.visit_end_date: The end date of the visit, indicating when the visit concluded.

visit_end_datetime.visit_end_datetime: The end datetime of the visit, providing a more precise timestamp for when the visit concluded.

visit_type_concept_id.visit_type_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the type of visit occurrence, providing a standardized code for the visit type.

provider_id.provider_id: An identifier linking to the healthcare provider who was involved in the visit, representing the medical professional responsible for the visit.

care_site_id.care_site_id: An identifier linking to the care site where the visit took place, representing the location of the visit.

visit_source_value.visit_source_value: A categorical attribute that provides the source value for the visit, indicating the original source of the visit data.

visit_source_concept_id.visit_source_concept_id: A categorical attribute that provides the source concept ID for the visit, linking to a standardized code for the visit source.

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the source from which the patient was admitted, providing a standardized code for the admission source.

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: A categorical attribute that provides the source value for the admission, indicating the original source of the admission data.

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the destination to which the patient was discharged, providing a standardized code for the discharge destination.

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: A categorical attribute that provides the source value for the discharge, indicating the original source of the discharge data.

preceding_visit_occurrence_id.preceding_visit_occurrence_id: An identifier linking to the previous visit occurrence, representing the visit that occurred before this one.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: A unique identifier for each visit detail record, serving as the primary key for tracking individual visit details.

person_id.person_id: An identifier linking to the person who had the visit, representing the individual associated with this visit detail.

visit_detail_concept_id.visit_detail_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the type of visit detail, providing a standardized classification.

visit_detail_start_date.visit_detail_start_date: The start date of the visit, indicating when the visit began.

visit_detail_start_datetime.visit_detail_start_datetime: The start datetime of the visit, providing a more precise timestamp for when the visit began.

visit_detail_end_date.visit_detail_end_date: The end date of the visit, indicating when the visit concluded.

visit_detail_end_datetime.visit_detail_end_datetime: The end datetime of the visit, providing a more precise timestamp for when the visit concluded.

visit_detail_type_concept_id.visit_detail_type_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the type of visit detail, providing a standardized classification.

provider_id.provider_id: An identifier linking to the healthcare provider associated with the visit, representing the professional who conducted the visit.

care_site_id.care_site_id: An identifier linking to the care site where the visit took place, representing the location of the visit.

visit_detail_source_value.visit_detail_source_value: A source value that provides additional context about the visit detail, such as the original source of the data.

visit_detail_source_concept_id.visit_detail_source_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the source of the visit detail, providing a standardized classification.

admitted_from_source_value.admitted_from_source_value: A source value that provides additional context about where the patient was admitted from, such as the original source of the data.

admitted_from_concept_id.admitted_from_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the source of admission, providing a standardized classification.

discharge_to_source_value.discharge_to_source_value: A source value that provides additional context about where the patient was discharged to, such as the original source of the data.

discharge_to_concept_id.discharge_to_concept_id: A categorical attribute that classifies the destination of discharge, providing a standardized classification.

preceding_visit_detail_id.preceding_visit_detail_id: An identifier linking to the previous visit detail, representing the sequence of visits.

visit_detail_parent_id.visit_detail_parent_id: An identifier linking to the parent visit detail, representing the hierarchical structure of visits.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: An identifier linking to the visit occurrence, representing the broader visit context.

measurement_id.measurement_id: A unique identifier for each measurement record, serving as the primary key for tracking individual measurements.

person_id.person_id: An identifier linking to the person entity, representing the individual who the measurement pertains to.

measurement_concept_id.measurement_concept_id: An identifier linking to the measurement concept entity, representing the type of measurement being recorded.

measurement_date.measurement_date: The date when the measurement was taken, indicating the timing of the measurement.

measurement_datetime.measurement_datetime: The exact date and time when the measurement was taken, providing a precise temporal attribute of the measurement.

measurement_time.measurement_time: The time of day when the measurement was taken, indicating the specific time of the measurement.

measurement_type_concept_id.measurement_type_concept_id: An identifier linking to the measurement type concept entity, representing the method or type of measurement.

operator_concept_id.operator_concept_id: An identifier linking to the operator concept entity, representing the operator or condition used in the measurement.

value_as_number.value_as_number: The numeric result of the measurement, representing the quantitative value recorded.

value_as_concept_id.value_as_concept_id: An identifier linking to the value concept entity, representing the conceptual result of the measurement.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: An identifier linking to the unit concept entity, representing the unit of measurement.

range_low.range_low: The lower bound of the normal range for the measurement, providing a reference for the measurement value.

range_high.range_high: The upper bound of the normal range for the measurement, providing a reference for the measurement value.

provider_id.provider_id: An identifier linking to the provider entity, representing the healthcare provider who recorded the measurement.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: An identifier linking to the visit occurrence entity, representing the visit during which the measurement was taken.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: An identifier linking to the visit detail entity, representing the detailed visit during which the measurement was taken.

measurement_source_value.measurement_source_value: The original value recorded in the source system, providing the raw data for the measurement.

measurement_source_concept_id.measurement_source_concept_id: An identifier linking to the measurement source concept entity, representing the source concept of the measurement.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The original unit of measurement recorded in the source system, providing the raw unit data for the measurement.

value_source_value.value_source_value: The original value recorded in the source system, providing the raw data for the measurement.

observation_id.observation_id: A unique identifier for each observation record, serving as the primary key for tracking individual observations.

person_id.person_id: An identifier linking to the person entity, representing the individual to whom the observation pertains.

observation_concept_id.observation_concept_id: An identifier linking to the concept entity, representing the type or category of the observation.

observation_date.observation_date: The date when the observation was made, indicating the timing of the observation.

observation_datetime.observation_datetime: The exact date and time when the observation was made, providing a more precise temporal attribute.

observation_type_concept_id.observation_type_concept_id: An identifier linking to the concept entity, representing the type of the observation.

value_as_number.value_as_number: A numeric value of the observation, representing a quantitative measurement.

value_as_string.value_as_string: A string value of the observation, representing a textual measurement or description.

value_as_concept_id.value_as_concept_id: An identifier linking to the concept entity, representing a concept value of the observation.

qualifier_concept_id.qualifier_concept_id: An identifier linking to the concept entity, representing a qualifier for the observation.

unit_concept_id.unit_concept_id: An identifier linking to the concept entity, representing the unit of measurement for the observation.

provider_id.provider_id: An identifier linking to the provider entity, representing the healthcare provider who made the observation.

visit_occurrence_id.visit_occurrence_id: An identifier linking to the visit occurrence entity, representing the visit during which the observation was made.

visit_detail_id.visit_detail_id: An identifier linking to the visit detail entity, representing the detailed visit during which the observation was made.

observation_source_value.observation_source_value: The source value of the observation, representing the original value from the source system.

observation_source_concept_id.observation_source_concept_id: An identifier linking to the concept entity, representing the source concept of the observation.

unit_source_value.unit_source_value: The source value of the unit of measurement, representing the original unit from the source system.

qualifier_source_value.qualifier_source_value: The source value of the qualifier, representing the original qualifier from the source system.

observation_event_id.observation_event_id: An identifier linking to the observation event entity, representing the event associated with the observation.

obs_event_field_concept_id.obs_event_field_concept_id: An identifier linking to the concept entity, representing the field concept of the observation event.

value_as_datetime.value_as_datetime: A datetime value of the observation, representing a temporal measurement.
